ab: djavadjavai a mapuljat, nusauni uri vaik itjen a sema qinaljan a paljilji tjaivuvu i cudjuy.
ch: A:大家好，今天我們要去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.
A: Are we almost there?
B:Almost there.
A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: ia! bulay angata, aku mun a macaqu a penaiwanan!
ch: B:你們會說排灣語， 啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You guys speak Paiwanese! That’s great!

ab: djavadjavai a mapuljat, nusauni uri vaik itjen a sema puvaquan a masengeseng.
ch: A:大家好，今天去我們要去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: idu, uri vaik anga itjen, kaciuciuri a mapuljat, paqenetju a nu turivecan.
ch: A:來!大家過來，我們要出發囉，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: ui sinsi, na masi turivecan anga amen.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.
A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: ui, tiaken a venilad ta qayaqayam.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: djavadjavay a mapuljat, uri vaik itjen a pacun ta qemuziquzip nusauni.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: cuay anga aken a kikaljavaljava, saka anema tja pakazuavan?
ch: B:我期待很久了!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: ljevavavu anan, veneli aken ta kipu.
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.
B: Yes.

ab: tjaljiqaca aravac ca imaza, mareka qayaqayam a i maza, qatjuvi a izua. liaw anan a mare timaljimalji a qemuziquzip kigaljuvu a pacun.
ch: A:動物園很大，這裡是鳥類，那邊是蛇類，還有很多不同的動物，你們慢慢看。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.There are many different animals, take your time.
B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: pumayan, saw pacunu ta qayaqayam numaya.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: kaqepui anga imaza nu pasuvililj ta cengelj a tjelu a milingan.
ch: A:下午3點，我們在這裡集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.
B: Yes, thank you.
A: What did you see today?

ab: liaw a nia pinacunan a maretimaljimalji a qatjuvi kata qayaqayam.
ch: B:我們看到了好多蛇和鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: ari anga, uri vaik anga itjen.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: kaljavau aken, masetu anga ku kula.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.
A: Shall we go swimming together?
B:Yes! Let’s go!
A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: kaimazavi a kemavekav, ljataladj a aravac zaljum izua.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
